title: hymenophyllum breve
intro: Hymenophyllum breve, also known as the short-leaf filmy fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum breve include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
